did_you_know.title: Jackie Robinson Breaks Baseball's Color Line
did_you_know.text: Jackie Robinson took the field for the Brooklyn Dodgers, becoming the first Black player in Major League Baseball's modern era.

did_you_know.title: March on Washington
did_you_know.text: Over 250,000 people gathered at the Lincoln Memorial where Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. delivered his 'I Have a Dream' speech.

did_you_know.title: Rosa Parks Refuses to Give Up Her Seat
did_you_know.text: Rosa Parks was arrested in Montgomery, Alabama after refusing to give up her bus seat, launching the Montgomery Bus Boycott.
